translation.literal_translation: And they also teach Him in this (place). (32)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.2.32: additional tradition (amnanti) teaches Him here, supporting Brahman-reference of Vaisvanara.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra seal invoking supplementary scriptural testimony.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S02 pass with stable cadence and inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit Jabala Avimukta phrasing and abhimana etymological glosses in records 1.2.079-1.2.081.
